ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test specimen */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material associated with the specimen */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the specimen */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the record */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was last modified */,
  "specimen_status" TEXT /* Status of the specimen (e.g., pending, tested, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_specimens_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_specimens_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test specimen being tested */,
  "elongation_failure" REAL /* Elongation at failure percentage */,
  "ultimate_elongation" REAL /* Ultimate elongation percentage */,
  "tensile_strength" REAL /* Tensile strength limit in MPa */,
  "failure_type" REAL /* Type of failure as a percentage */,
  "failure_rate" REAL /* Failure rate as a percentage */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test and its results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES test_specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material properties and use cases */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the material */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier name */,
  "supplier_date" TEXT /* Date of material supply */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project objectives */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test (e.g., Tensile Test) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test and its purpose */,
  "test_procedure" TEXT /* Detailed procedure for conducting the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "failures" (
  "failure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of failure */,
  "failure_name" TEXT /* Name of the failure type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the failure and its implications */,
  "failure_causes" TEXT /* Common causes of this failure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("failure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "lab_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of test being conducted */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the laboratory where the test is conducted */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the test session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the session record */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the test session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test specimen being logged */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES test_specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_specimen_equipment" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test specimen */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_session_equipment" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test session */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the equipment used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "equipment_id")
)
